name: content-craft
description: Research-backed content & design craft — two generic user-space skills: blog-article-writing (AIDA/PAS frameworks, headline patterns, readability, editing checklist) and design-skills-2026 (WCAG 2.1 AA, Core Web Vitals, mobile-first responsive UI, typography, motion, onboarding UI patterns). Generic, evidence-based — no PD IP. Conversion-/PLG-psychology lives in the sales plugin.
